panels.title: Time per phase over time (stacked, ms)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_sync_phase" and r._field == "duration_seconds")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.version =~ /${version:regex}/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 1000.0 }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "phase"])
  |> group(columns: ["phase"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_sync_phase" and r._field == "duration_seconds")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.version =~ /${version:regex}/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 1000.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["phase"])
  |> quantile(q: 0.95)
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_sync_phase" and r._field == "duration_seconds")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.version =~ /${version:regex}/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 1000.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["phase"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["phase", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "mean"})

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_sync_phase" and r._field == "duration_seconds")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.version =~ /${version:regex}/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 1000.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["phase"])
  |> quantile(q: 0.95)
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["phase", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "p95"})

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_sync_phase" and r._field == "duration_seconds")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.version =~ /${version:regex}/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 1000.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["phase"])
  |> max()
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["phase", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "max"})

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_sync" and r._field == "duration_seconds")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.version =~ /${version:regex}/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 1000.0 }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "version"])
  |> group(columns: ["version"])
